ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was registered in the system */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., Heart, Liver, Kidney, Eye) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases code */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the disease (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_disease_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases for the patient and disease combination */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_disease_records_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_disease_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who prescribed the treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., ongoing, completed, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was registered in the system */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., disease prevalence, treatment outcomes) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head FOREIGN KEY ("department_head") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
